name: Cannon Ball Shoot
description: Cannon Ball Shoot is a free online number and puzzle game for boys played on Puzzlegame. You need to aim and shoot your balls and choose the right door to multiply the number of balls. Successfully push down the obstacles in front of you and complete the pinball task to pass the level! Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. So, why not try it now? Enjoy yourself!
tags: Android, Arcade, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Fun, Highscore, HTML5, Kids, Math, Number, Obstacle, Online, Platform, Puzzle, Shooting
